mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.summary, n.cover_url, n.content, n.category_id, c.name AS category_name, n.source, n.author, n.status, n.views, n.publish_time, n.create_time, n.update_time, n.create_by, n.update_by, n.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_news n LEFT JOIN edu_news_category c ON c.id = n.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_news (title, summary, cover_url, content, category_id, source, author, status, views, publish_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{content}, #{categoryId}, #{source}, #{author}, #{status}, 0, CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_news SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, source = #{source}, author = #{author}, status = #{status}, publish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 AND publish_time IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE publish_time END, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_news SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_news SET views = IFNULL(views, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_news WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
